text:
<think>The area is 114.0 and the perimeter is 50.0. Now, I need to decrease these values by 50%. I will use the decrease_by_percent tool for both the area and the perimeter.</think>
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "decrease_by_percent", "arguments": {"value": "$var1.area$", "percent": 50}, "label": "$var2"}]</tool_call_answer>
